puzzles.title: Intro to Foldit
puzzles.description: Learn about amino acids and the basic building blocks of proteins.

puzzles.title: Swing It Around
puzzles.description: Get comfortable with the mechanics of playing Foldit.

puzzles.title: Hide the Hydrophobics
puzzles.description: Learn about sidechains and their impact on protein folding.

puzzles.title: Hydrogen Bonds
puzzles.description: See how nitrogen and oxygen form hydrogen bonds that stabilize proteins.

puzzles.title: Disulfide Bonds
puzzles.description: Learn about a bond stronger than hydrogen bonds that certain sidechains can form.

puzzles.title: Intro to Design
puzzles.description: Visualize proteins as a string of amino acid building blocks.

puzzles.title: Swappin' Sidechains
puzzles.description: Experiment with the placement of sidechains and their different properties.

puzzles.title: COVID-19 Spike Binder
puzzles.description: See a real-world relevant example of how different sidechains make a difference.

puzzles.title: Primary Structure
puzzles.description: Design the amino acid sequence of a protein to make the best version!

puzzles.title: Shake
puzzles.description: Find the best positions and lowest energy for the sidechains.

puzzles.title: Wiggle
puzzles.description: Find the best positions and lowest energy for the backbone.

puzzles.title: Wiggle Power
puzzles.description: Experiment with automation tool settings.

puzzles.title: Alpha Helix
puzzles.description: See the bonds present in spiraling backbones called alpha helices.

puzzles.title: Sheets Together
puzzles.description: See how the backbone forms H-bonds to stabilize the protein in beta sheets.

puzzles.title: Band Together
puzzles.description: Learn how to use a new tool that will help you make beta sheets for effective protein folding.

puzzles.title: Lonely Sheets
puzzles.description: See how your knowledge of proteins can help you use the tools at your disposal for successful folding!

puzzles.title: Sheets and Ladders
puzzles.description: Practice lining up beta sheets to form new H-bonds.

puzzles.title: Lock and Lower
puzzles.description: Learn to use a new tool to control how automating tools impact your fold.

puzzles.title: Freeze and Bond
puzzles.description: Focus on the biochemistry influencing your score!

puzzles.title: Parallel and Anti-Parallel
puzzles.description: Experiment with different ways to align beta sheets.

puzzles.title: Exploring the Rama Map
puzzles.description: Explore the importance of backbone angles.

puzzles.title: Idealizing Structure Angles
puzzles.description: Visualize the impact of angles on protein structures.

puzzles.title: Sequence Preference
puzzles.description: Explore how different sidechains benefit or inhibit different secondary structures.

puzzles.title: Backbones Collide
puzzles.description: Experiment with moving the backbone of a protein.

puzzles.title: Movin' Along
puzzles.description: Try to line up your protein fold with a guide.

puzzles.title: Cut and Move
puzzles.description: Practice using a new tool that can help you approach protein folding one piece at a time.

puzzles.title: Basic Threading
puzzles.description: Visualize proteins as strings of amino acids and learn about the similarities between certain residues.

puzzles.title: Alignin' Sequences
puzzles.description: Practice using known protein folds and similarities between sequences to fold a new protein!

puzzles.title: Blueprint
puzzles.description: Experiment with common structure sequences to fold the protein.

puzzles.title: Quest to the Native
puzzles.description: Try folding a protein with the help of a guide.

puzzles.title: Tertiary Structure
puzzles.description: Try folding a protein without a guide.

puzzles.title: Third Time's the Charm
puzzles.description: Practice your skills a little more to prepare you for the levels to come!

puzzles.title: Barrel Through
puzzles.description: Learn about a less common, but still important, kind of secondary structure!

puzzles.title: Hydrophobic Disaster
puzzles.description: Use your knowledge from previous puzzles to fold this protein!

puzzles.title: Folding Pathway I
puzzles.description: Learn about the energy that’s influencing your score.

puzzles.title: Folding Pathway II
puzzles.description: Experiment with taking a protein from an intermediate to its final fold!

puzzles.title: Ligand Debut
puzzles.description: Learn about the role of proteins and protein binding in drug design.

puzzles.title: Inside the Pocket
puzzles.description: Practice designing a ligand to fit to a protein!

puzzles.title: Ligand Constraints
puzzles.description: Explore the factors that impact ligand binding.

puzzles.title: Electron Density
puzzles.description: Discover how X-Ray Crystallography is used to solve protein structures.

puzzles.title: DNA and Protein
puzzles.description: See how proteins can interact with DNA!

puzzles.title: Collagen
puzzles.description: Fold the most abundant protein in the human body!

puzzles.title: Insulin
puzzles.description: Try to fold this metabolism regulating protein!

puzzles.title: Ubiquitin
puzzles.description: Fold this protein important in regulating protein folding itself!

puzzles.title: Fibrin
puzzles.description: Experiment with folding this blood clotting protein!

puzzles.title: Coronavirus
puzzles.description: Use your knowledge of ligand binding!

puzzles.title: Ebola
puzzles.description: Flex your ligand binding skills!

puzzles.title: HIV Protease
puzzles.description: Try folding a protein involved in HIV replication.

puzzles.title: E. Coli
puzzles.description: Fold this protein found in bacteria you may have encountered!

puzzles.title: Mason-Pfizer Monkey Virus
puzzles.description: Try your hand at the puzzle that helped make Foldit famous!

puzzles.title: Sequence Design with Machine Learning
puzzles.description: Learn how to use the ProteinMPNN model for sequence design

categories.title: Sidechains and Amino Acids
categories.description: Welcome to Foldit, let’s get started with the basics!

categories.title: Properties of Amino Acid Sidechains
categories.description: Learn about the special bonds that hold proteins together.

categories.title: Primary Structures
categories.description: Let’s learn about protein design and basic structure!

categories.title: Automation Tools
categories.description: These helpful Foldit tools make it easier to get the best score possible!

categories.title: Intro to Secondary Structures
categories.description: Move from amino acids to bigger structure blocks.

categories.title: Forming Secondary Structures
categories.description: Explore factors that influence the stability of secondary structures and proteins!

categories.title: From Primary to Tertiary Structure
categories.description: Let’s learn more about how proteins fold!

categories.title: Forming Tertiary Structure
categories.description: Use your skills to fully fold proteins to their tertiary structure!

categories.title: Proteins in Nature
categories.description: Learn about the real-world aspects of protein folding and protein design.

categories.title: Popular Proteins
categories.description: Try folding some proteins that you may have heard of before!

categories.title: Bacteria and Viruses
categories.description: See how protein folding works with some pathogens you may know about!

categories.title: Machine Learning
categories.description: Learn how cutting edge Machine Learning tools can be used to design proteins!
